description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow consists of four jobs: compilers, linux, mxe64, and mxe32. The compilers job tests compiler compatibility across multiple compilers on ubuntu-20.04. The linux job builds on ubuntu-20.04 and ubuntu-18.04. The mxe64 and mxe32 jobs perform MXE cross builds for Windows 64-bit and 32-bit, respectively, on ubuntu-18.04.
